---
# Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
# Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial
title: "Generating exports"
date: last-modified
listing:
  - id: exports
    type: grid
    max-description-length: 250
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [title, description]
    contents:
      - export-inventory.qmd
      - export-documents.qmd
      - export-artifacts.qmd
      - export-analytics.qmd
---

Export your documents, inventory, artifacts, and analytics for use outside of the {{< var validmind.platform >}}.

:::{#exports}
:::

## What's next

- [Ongoing monitoring](/guide/monitoring/ongoing-monitoring.qmd)
- [Working with attestations](/guide/attestation/working-with-attestations.qmd)
